query:
SELECT 
  u.name,
  u.email,
  CAST(up.territories AS CHAR) as territories,
  CAST(up.assignedBusinessLines AS CHAR) as businessLines,
  edp.enabled as digestEnabled
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN userProfiles up ON up.userId = u.id
LEFT JOIN emailDigestPrefs edp ON edp.userId = u.id
WHERE u.name IN ('Ryan Pemberton', 'Lee', 'Alexandre Leite')
ORDER BY u.name;
